summary: Completed backend + frontend regression testing for billing tiers/Stripe checkout init-status, academy catalog, chart overwrite update flow, dashboard quick access, natal wheel rendering, and existing reading/daily flows. All executed tests passed.
action_items: Optional: clean up browser console warning from unsupported preload 'as' value
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking code-level defects found in reviewed billing/chart/academy/dashboard implementation during this test run
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed API user for backend pytest and one UI signup user with onboarding chart
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added backend regression suite for billing/academy/chart-update at /app/backend/tests/test_billing_academy_chart_update.py; full pytest run passed 17/17 against public preview URL. Frontend Playwright run verified quick-access cards, locked tier UX, Stripe redirect initiation, academy catalog, natal wheel render, and account chart regeneration.
rca of the issue: No functional failures reproduced. Stripe checkout initiation and status sync endpoints returned successful responses; chart overwrite via PUT /api/chart/current preserved chart id and updated saved values as expected.
